evals.prompt: Scan the file README.md for any email addresses that should not be in the codebase
evals.expected_output: Detection of email patterns in the file with a report of which ones are violations vs allowed exceptions.
assertions: Uses grep with email regex pattern to scan the file
Identifies real email addresses as violations
Excludes test domains (example.com, example.org) from violations
Reports file path and line numbers for each match

evals.prompt: Replace the email address support@myproject.com in CONTRIBUTING.md with a GitHub Issues link
evals.expected_output: The email address replaced with a GitHub Issues URL pointing to the repo's issues page.
assertions: Identifies the email address in the file
Replaces it with a GitHub Issues URL (https://github.com/owner/repo/issues)
Does not leave any email addresses in the file
